package.name: nav_algo_core
package.description: ROS 1 Noetic port of the algorithmic core of Nav2 Humble's SmacPlannerLattice + MPPIController. This package builds a pure C++ static library (no node, no ROS publishers/subscribers). The Smac and MPPI ROS plugins (nav_algo_smac_ros1, nav_algo_mppi_ros1) link against this library and expose nav_core::BaseGlobalPlanner / BaseLocalPlanner interfaces.
